name: Muslin Swaddle Blankets 3pk - Cloud Island™ Clouds
description:
Your baby will stay warm and cozy with these Muslin Swaddle Blankets from cloud island™. This three-pack of baby blankets includes a light blue square swaddle blanket and two white square swaddle blankets, one with a gray star print and another with a light blue cloud print, to help add a touch of sweet style to their snuggle time. Made from 100% cotton, these muslin swaddle blankets feel soft against their skin and offer cozy comfort, and they are machine-washable to make cleaning and maintenance a breeze. Great for swaddling your little one to help them get the sleep they need, these versatile blankets are also handy to use as a stroller cover, burp cloth and more.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
